payload.label: sink
payload.long_description: Partial edge-cropped off-white ceramic sink rim with a rounded glossy profile; brownish staining/discoloration is visible along the front edge and a partially visible metal drain or overflow appears at the right, photographed close-up at roughly 0.6 m.
